name: python3-pynfsclient
title: python3-pynfsclient
summary: Python library to simulate NFS client
description:
Python library to simulate NFS client
pyNfsClient is a generic open source toolkit for Linux NFS file system
simulation as client. Constructed parameters are sent via RPC and then
the response is analyzed in reference to NFS protocol specifications
(RFC1813).
.
You could form your custom scenarios that consist of basic actions to meet
expectations.
.
Currently only NFSv3 is supported, NFS v4.1 is under development.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-pynfsclient because Python library to simulate NFS client.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-pynfsclient as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-pynfsclient with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-pynfsclient --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
